title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Arena Animation - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Arena Animation - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Arena Animation, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Ludhiana operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Arena Animation:
Arena Animation is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Support students with special educational needs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Arena Animation!
